validation.isInteger: This field must be an integer.
validation.isNumeric: This field must be a number.
validation.decimalMax: This field may have at most :decimal decimal places.
validation.minLength: This field must be at least :length characters.
validation.maxLength: This field may not exceed :length characters.
validation.min: This field must be at least :min.
validation.regex: This field has an invalid format.
validation.different: This field must be different from :field.
validation.confirmed: This field's confirmation does not match.
validation.requiredIf: This field is required when :field is :value.
validation.requiredWith: This field is required when :field is present.
validation.requiredWithout: This field is required when :field is missing.
validation.date: This field must be a valid date.
validation.dateFormat: This field must match the format :format.
validation.before: This field must be a date before :date.
validation.after: This field must be a date after :date.
validation.boolean: This field must be a boolean.
